subcodes.first_line: O thou whom the Lord hath aided to magnify His Word and to diffuse the sweet savours of the rose-garden of His holiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ایده الله لاعلاء کلمه الله و نشر نفحات ریاض قدسه چندی بود که در این سجن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @law of pilgrimage, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
